items.title: More Room for Lists
items.description: The lists screen now skips the shopping snapshot when there are no lists, giving the empty state and list area more space on phones.

items.title: Compact Shopping Summary
items.description: When lists exist, the shopping snapshot is now a shorter summary strip with remaining items, progress, active lists, and shared lists.

items.title: Better Android Fit
items.description: The overview takes less vertical space so more list cards are visible on smaller Android screens.

items.title: No Behavior Change
items.description: List data, sharing, and sync behavior are unchanged.
